Code.title: A BankAccountContractBalanceKeyFigureCode is a coded representation of a key figure for a balance of a BankAccountContract.
Code.description: Remark: The valid code values for a loan contract are described in the BDT BankAccountContractBalanceKeyFigureCode.

Description.example: An amount that is the initial loan contract amount.
Description.title: Description of a balance key figure.

Amount.title: An amount that specifies the amount of the balance key figure.
Amount.description: Integrity constraint: CurrencyCode of Amount has to be equal to CurrencyCode of LoanContract.

com.sap.gateway.default.loancontract.v00.title: BalanceKeyFigures
com.sap.gateway.default.loancontract.v00.description: A BalanceKeyFigure is a key figure that describes an amount pertaining to a loan contract.

com.sap.gateway.default.loancontract.v00.title: BalanceKeyFigures (for create)
com.sap.gateway.default.loancontract.v00.description: A BalanceKeyFigure is a key figure that describes an amount pertaining to a loan contract.

com.sap.gateway.default.loancontract.v00.title: BalanceKeyFigures (for update)
com.sap.gateway.default.loancontract.v00.description: A BalanceKeyFigure is a key figure that describes an amount pertaining to a loan contract.

ID.title: Unique identifier of an adjustment of a committed capital for a loan contract.

ValidityPeriod.title: The period in which the Committed Capital Adjustment is valid.
ValidityPeriod.description: It describes the period when the committed capital adjustment is used. GDT:ValidityPeriod

Amount.title: The amount by which the committed capital is adjusted.
Amount.description: A negative amount decreases the committed capital amount and a positive amount increases the committed capital amount. GDT: Amount

com.sap.gateway.default.loancontract.v00.title: CommittedCapitalAdjustment
com.sap.gateway.default.loancontract.v00.description: Adjusts the loan capital amount that is committed for the specified period.Remark: This functionality is realized in the backend using Seasonal Limits.The effects of this adjustment can be seen using transaction BCA_CN_KFG and requesting "Interest and Capital Amounts".Constraint:  Increase adjustments can be made in the contract future; decrease adjustments can only be made in the contract present.

ValidityPeriod.title: The period in which the Committed Capital Adjustment is valid.
ValidityPeriod.description: It describes the period when the committed capital adjustment is used. GDT:ValidityPeriod

Amount.title: The amount by which the committed capital is adjusted.
Amount.description: A negative amount decreases the committed capital amount and a positive amount increases the committed capital amount. GDT: Amount

com.sap.gateway.default.loancontract.v00.title: CommittedCapitalAdjustment (for create)
com.sap.gateway.default.loancontract.v00.description: Adjusts the loan capital amount that is committed for the specified period.Remark: This functionality is realized in the backend using Seasonal Limits.The effects of this adjustment can be seen using transaction BCA_CN_KFG and requesting "Interest and Capital Amounts".Constraint:  Increase adjustments can be made in the contract future; decrease adjustments can only be made in the contract present.

Amount.title: The amount by which the committed capital is adjusted.

CalculationReasonCode.title: A coded representation of the reason for a effective yield calculation for a bank account contract.
CalculationReasonCode.description: Remark: The valid code values for a loan contract are described in the GDT EffectiveYieldCalculationReasonCode.

CalculationReasonName.title: The name of an effective yield calculation reason code.

CalculationMethodCode.title: A coded representation of the method for calculating the effective interest rate.
CalculationMethodCode.description: Remark: The valid code values for a loan contract are described in the GDT EffectiveYieldCalculationMethodCode.

CalculationMethodName.title: The name of a calculation method code.

BankingBusinessTransactionTypeCode.title: BankingBusinessTransactionTypeCode is the coded representation of the banking business transaction which is associated with the calculation of the bank account contract effective yield.

ValidityStartDate.title: The date at which the effective yield validity begins.

CalculationPeriod.title: The period for which EffectiveYieldPercent is calculated.
CalculationPeriod.description: It describes the period for which EffectiveYieldPercent is calculated.GDT:CLOSED_DatePeriod

com.sap.gateway.default.loancontract.v00.description: An EffectiveYields is the effective yield (effective interest) of a bank account contract.

ID.title: An identifier of an incoming payment agreement belonging to a loan contract.

Period.title: Is the period in which the IncomingPaymentAgreement is valid.

PlannedFinalPaymentAmount.title: The amount of the final payment that is planned for the incoming payment agreement.
PlannedFinalPaymentAmount.description: Use: Use: The planned final payment for a loan is a payment agreed with the borrower party. It is due as the last payment of the loan.  GDT: Amount

LastPaymentDatePeriodEndAdjustmentIndica.title: Indicates whether the last payment date in the payment plan must be adjusted to the end date of the period of the incoming payment agreement or not.

com.sap.gateway.default.loancontract.v00.title: IncomingPaymentAgreement
com.sap.gateway.default.loancontract.v00.description: An Incoming Payment Agreement is an agreement that specifies the term for the incoming payments of the loan contract.

PlannedFinalPaymentAmount.title: The amount of the final payment that is planned for the incoming payment agreement.
PlannedFinalPaymentAmount.description: Use: Use: The planned final payment for a loan is a payment agreed with the borrower party. It is due as the last payment of the loan.  GDT: Amount

LastPaymentDatePeriodEndAdjustmentIndica.title: Indicates whether the last payment date in the payment plan must be adjusted to the end date of the period of the incoming payment agreement or not.

UUID.title: An universal unique identifier of a bank account contract.

ID.title: An identifier of a bank account contract.

CurrencyCode.title: A CurrencyCode specifies the currency of the bank account contract.

BankAccountIdentifyingElements.title: A BankAccount is a bank account associated with the bank account contract.

LifeCycleStatusCode.title: A coded representation of the life cycle status of a bank account contract.

BorrowerPartyIdentifyingElements.title: A BorrowerParty is a party who takes up a financial instrument, in this case a loan contract.

Product.title: A Product describes the (financial) product upon which the bank account contract is based.

BusinessEventRecord.title: A record of a business event that changes a bank account contract.

OperationalBankContractManagement.title: An OperationalBankContractManagement is responsible for managing operational bank contracts and executing the related banking processes.
OperationalBankContractManagement.description: A functional unit that is responsible for managing the contract.

BusinessProcessChainAssignment.title: Business Process Chain Assignment is the assignment of a business object node to a business process chain.

ChangeStateID.title: A ChangeStateID is a unique identifier for a change state.

ClearingBankAccountContract.title: A ClearingBankAccountContract is a BankAccountContract that receives incoming payments that have to be transferred to a specific loan contract.
ClearingBankAccountContract.description: Remark: The ClearingBankAccountContract can be changed.

TermSpecification.title: A specification of term elements that affects all term agreements of the loan contract.
TermSpecification.description: Corresponds to tab 'Agreement' in backend Agreement number not included because only one agreement is allowed

com.sap.gateway.default.loancontract.v00.title: Loan Contract
com.sap.gateway.default.loancontract.v00.description: Loan Contract is a contractual agreement between lenders and borrowers, which is based on a borrowerÃ¢â‚¬â„¢s request for a loan and includes, for example, loan type, borrower(s), and general terms and conditions.  Comment: A BankAccount is a bank account associated with the bank account contract.   Integrity Condition:StartDate of TermSpecificationValidityPeriod, TermAgreementFixingPeriod, and IncomingPaymentAgreementPeriod have to be the same date.   Constraint: Loan Contract Create - During creation of a loan contract , it is required to specify the details of Term Agreement and Inpayment Agreement.

UUID.title: A UUID is a globally unique identifier for a PaymentTransactionInstruction.

BankingBusinessTransactionTypeCode.title: A BankingBusinessTransactionTypeCode is a coded representation of the type of business transaction from a banking view.
BankingBusinessTransactionTypeCode.description: Remark: Specifies the business transaction for which the payment transaction instruction is used. GDT: BankingBusinessTransactionTypeCode

BankingBusinessTransactionProcessingResu.title: A BankingBusinessTransactionProcessingResultingPaymentTypeCode is a coded representation of the payment type that results from processing a banking business transaction.

BankContractPaymentTransactionInstructio.title: A BankContractPaymentTransactionInstructionTypeCode is a coded representation of the type of a bank contract payment transaction instruction.

DebitCreditCode.title: A coded representation of the credit or debit side of payment transaction instruction.
DebitCreditCode.description: Remark: A DebitCreditCode is used to identify the resulting payment transaction as a credit or debit transaction. GDT: DebitCreditCode

CounterpartyBankAccount.title: Contains the bank account to which funds are either transferred or collected from.
CounterpartyBankAccount.description: Comment: The Counterparty is the party that participates in a payment transaction. Remark: If DebitCreditCode is 'Credit', funds are transferred to the bank account. If DebitCreditCode is 'Debit', funds are collected from the bank account.

DirectDebitMandate.title: The direct debit mandate used in a payment transaction instruction.
DirectDebitMandate.description: Remark: DirectDebitMandate is only applicable, if value for DebitCreditCode is 'Debit'.

com.sap.gateway.default.loancontract.v00.title: PaymentTransactionInstruction
com.sap.gateway.default.loancontract.v00.description: A payment transaction instruction is an instruction for payment transactions related to the bank account contract.  Remark: A payment transaction instruction is used in banking business transaction to trigger a payment transaction.

BankingBusinessTransactionTypeCode.title: A BankingBusinessTransactionTypeCode is a coded representation of the type of business transaction from a banking view.
BankingBusinessTransactionTypeCode.description: Remark: Specifies the business transaction for which the payment transaction instruction is used. GDT: BankingBusinessTransactionTypeCode

BankingBusinessTransactionProcessingResu.title: A BankingBusinessTransactionProcessingResultingPaymentTypeCode is a coded representation of the payment type that results from processing a banking business transaction.

BankContractPaymentTransactionInstructio.title: A BankContractPaymentTransactionInstructionTypeCode is a coded representation of the type of a bank contract payment transaction instruction.

DebitCreditCode.title: A coded representation of the credit or debit side of payment transaction instruction.
DebitCreditCode.description: Remark: A DebitCreditCode is used to identify the resulting payment transaction as a credit or debit transaction. GDT: DebitCreditCode

CounterpartyBankAccount.title: Contains the bank account to which funds are either transferred or collected from.
CounterpartyBankAccount.description: Comment: The Counterparty is the party that participates in a payment transaction. Remark: If DebitCreditCode is 'Credit', funds are transferred to the bank account. If DebitCreditCode is 'Debit', funds are collected from the bank account.

DirectDebitMandate.title: The direct debit mandate used in a payment transaction instruction.
DirectDebitMandate.description: Remark: DirectDebitMandate is only applicable, if value for DebitCreditCode is 'Debit'.

ID.title: An identifier of a term agreement belonging to a loan contract.

CommittedCapitalAmount.title: The CommittedAmount is the committed amount of the term agreement of a loan contract.

BankContractFinancialConditionContextVal.title: A coded representation of the value of a context.

FixingPeriod.title: A FixingPeriod is the period for which the term agreement is fixed.
FixingPeriod.description: Use: the FixingPeriod is the period for which the committed capital amount is fixed.

com.sap.gateway.default.loancontract.v00.title: TermAgreement
com.sap.gateway.default.loancontract.v00.description: The TermAgreement is an agreement on the terms of a loan contractCorresponds to tab 'Condition Fixing' in backend  Constraint: Only context code value 34 "Loan Contract Term Agreement Condition Determination Key" is supported for BankContractFinancialConditionContextValueCode = VC or  BankContractFinancialConditionContextValueCode = FC. Note: While creating LoanContract we have to pass same attributes for all term agreements.It means all the records in TermAgreement should have the same attributes during POST call.Even if some attributes are not required, we can pass those with blank value to make the request homogeneous.

CommittedCapitalAmount.title: The CommittedAmount is the committed amount of the term agreement of a loan contract.

BankContractFinancialConditionContextVal.title: A coded representation of the value of a context.

FixingPeriod.title: A FixingPeriod is the period for which the term agreement is fixed.
FixingPeriod.description: Use: the FixingPeriod is the period for which the committed capital amount is fixed.

Note: While creating LoanContract we have to pass same attributes for all term agreements.It means all the records in TermAgreement should have the same attributes during POST call.Even if some attributes are not required, we can pass those with blank value to make the request homogeneous.

CommittedCapitalAmount.title: The CommittedAmount is the committed amount of the term agreement of a loan contract.

BankContractFinancialConditionContextVal.title: A coded representation of the value of a context.

FixingPeriod.title: A FixingPeriod is the period for which the term agreement is fixed.
FixingPeriod.description: Use: the FixingPeriod is the period for which the committed capital amount is fixed.

com.sap.gateway.default.loancontract.v00.title: TermAgreement (for update)
com.sap.gateway.default.loancontract.v00.description: The TermAgreement is an agreement on the terms of a loan contractCorresponds to tab 'Condition Fixing' in backend  Constraint: Only context code value 34 "Loan Contract Term Agreement Condition Determination Key" is supported for BankContractFinancialConditionContextValueCode = VC or  BankContractFinancialConditionContextValueCode = FC. Note: While creating LoanContract we have to pass same attributes for all term agreements.It means all the records in TermAgreement should have the same attributes during POST call.Even if some attributes are not required, we can pass those with blank value to make the request homogeneous.

CurrencyCode.title: Currency unit in accordance with the ISO 4217 three-character code.
CurrencyCode.description: A currency must always be specified. GDT: CurrencyCode

LoanContractUsedIndicator.title: Indicates whether the loan contract is used as clearing bank account contract
LoanContractUsedIndicator.description: GDT: Indicator Remark: If this indicator is not set, it implies that the Clearing Bank Account Contract used for incoming payments to the loan , is different than the loan contract. Constraint : If LoanContractUsedIndicator is true, the ClearingBankAccountContractUUID must not be specified

com.sap.gateway.default.loancontract.v00.title: ClearingBankAccountContract
com.sap.gateway.default.loancontract.v00.description: A ClearingBankAccountContract is a BankAccountContract that receives incoming payments that have to be transferred to a specific loan contract.Remark: The ClearingBankAccountContract can be changed.Constraint: Loan Contract Create - During creation of a Loan Contract , it is required to either specify the ClearingBankAccountContractUUID or ClearingBankAccountContract LoanContractUsedIndicator.
